subcodes.title: Words spoken at Hearst estate in Pleasanton, 1912-10-14
subcodes.first_line: Thou seest us, O my God, gathered around this table, praising Thy bounty, with our gaze set upon Thy Kingdom.

translations.text:
Odur Allah! S…ôn bizi g√∂r√ľrs…ôn, ey m…ônim AllahńĪm, bu s√ľfr…ô …ôtrafńĪnda toplaŇümńĪŇüńĪq, S…ônin k…ôr…ômini t…ôrif edir v…ô n…ôz…ôrimizi S…ônin M…ôl…ôkutuna dikmiŇüik. Ya R…ôbb! S…ônin s…ômavi ruzini nazil eyl…ô v…ô biz…ô nem…ôtl…ôrini …ôta et.

S…ôn, h…ôqiq…ôt…ôn, B…ôxŇüed…ôn, R…ôhmli v…ô R…ôhmansan.

## Gatherings

He is God! Thou seest us, O my God, gathered around this table, praising Thy bounty, with our gaze set upon Thy Kingdom. O Lord! Send down upon us Thy heavenly food and confer upon us Thy blessing. Thou art verily the Bestower, the Merciful, the Compassionate.
translations.name: Gatherings
